---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new Kotlin extension or DSL improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

<!--
Wire-format / spec / annotation proposals belong upstream at
trendvidia/protowire — they affect every port. Codec API additions
belong at trendvidia/protowire-java.

This template is for KOTLIN-IDIOM-ONLY changes (new suspend wrappers,
DSL builders, Flow operators, conversions to/from Kotlin idioms).
-->

## Problem

What's awkward to express today, or what's missing?

## Proposal

What you'd like to add. If it's a new public extension, sketch the
signature and the typical call-site.

## Alternatives considered

What else you tried, and why it isn't enough.

## Out of scope (optional)

Things this proposal is **not** trying to do, to keep review focused.
